title: Natsu 16x
description: Animated resource pack for everything 1.8 wether that is PVP or survival, you decide!
body:
# **Natsu 16x** 
A texturepack for Minecraft 1.8 that adds animations for various textures!
It provides a beautiful purple retexturing for weapons, tools, health items, and GUI.
Add a little extra life to your 1.8 Minecraft experience with Natsu's animated textures!
Ideal for Skyblock, Survival, and PVP!
